ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Gail L. Jackson- McCray, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
